title: Set 7: The Cooking Competition 👨‍🍳
instructions_en: READ THE STORY. CHOOSE A WORD FROM THE BOX. WRITE THE CORRECT WORD NEXT TO NUMBERS 1–5. THERE IS ONE EXAMPLE.
story_segments: Last Saturday, my sister and I decided to enter a cooking competition. We spent all morning in the
preparing a special chocolate cake. First, we mixed the sugar, eggs, and
in a large bowl. It was messy, but we had a lot of fun working

.

When we put the cake in the oven, the house soon
and wanted to eat it immediately, but my sister said we had to

for it to cool down.

When the judges tasted our cake, they smiled and gave us a small silver cup. We were so proud! We decided to bake another cake for our grandmother's birthday next week.

title_question.prompt: Now choose the best name for the story. Write a letter:

explanations_vi: Trộn đường, trứng và bột mì (flour) trong một cái bát lớn.
Làm việc cùng nhau (together) rất vui.
Khi bánh vào lò, căn nhà có mùi thơm (smelt - quá khứ của smell).
Cảm thấy đói (hungry) và muốn ăn ngay lập tức.
Chị nói phải chờ (wait) cho bánh nguội.
Tiêu đề B (Nướng chiếc bánh chiến thắng) tóm tắt đúng nhất: hai chị em nướng bánh và giành được chiếc cúp bạc nhỏ.
